name: Madison Square Garden Sports Corp.
summary: PART I Madison Square Garden Sports Corp., is a Nevada corporation with our principal executive offices at Two Pennsylvania Plaza, New York, NY 10121. Unless the context otherwise requires, all references to we, us, our, MSG Sports or the Company refer collectively to Madison Square Garden Sports Corp., a holding company, and its direct and indirect subsidiaries.
